prompt:
Goal: Create a clean anime fashion lineup sheet featuring one tall slim young woman shown in exactly 5 full-body winter streetwear outfit variations, standing side by side on a plain white background. The character has long orange hair, pale skin, a slim model-like build, and softly blurred/featureless faces with no detailed facial features. Use delicate Japanese anime illustration linework, high-detail clothing folds, layered fabrics, realistic accessories, and a polished character-design-sheet look.

Canvas: Landscape 4:3 composition, full-body figures visible from head to shoes, evenly spaced across the width, no background props, no text, no logos, no watermark.

Subject details: The same character appears 5 times with consistent height, body proportions, and hair color, but each pose and hairstyle is slightly different. Count and depict exactly 5 outfit variants:

1. Left outfit: Long orange hair in a loose side ponytail, cropped light gray bomber jacket over a dark navy ribbed turtleneck sweater, dark high-waisted cargo pants with belts and straps, chunky gray sneakers, small gray crossbody bag, one hand raised near the collar, casual confident stance.

2. Second outfit: Orange hair in a loose side braid, oversized off-white cable-knit one-shoulder sweater over a pale blue-gray turtleneck, charcoal wide cropped trousers with dangling belt strap, black ankle boots with cream fur cuffs, relaxed elegant winter look.

3. Center outfit: High orange ponytail blowing to the side, bright cobalt blue cropped puffer cape/jacket over a neon yellow fitted long-sleeve top, high-waisted deep plum wide culotte skirt or cropped pants, black leggings, patterned navy-and-white socks, chunky white sneakers, fluffy white crossbody bag, playful mid-step pose with one foot lifted.

4. Fourth outfit: Long straight orange hair, black layered avant-garde coat over a quilted black vest and black shirt, white high-neck inner layer, long asymmetrical pleated black skirt, gray tights, black platform lace-up shoes, carrying a small black handbag, calm upright pose, gothic minimalist fashion.

5. Right outfit: Orange hair in small twin buns with long loose strands, pale blue-green turtleneck sweater, white and light gray technical hooded jacket with pockets, gray belted shorts or mini skirt over black leggings, mint leg warmers, white chunky sneakers, small gray utility pouch, one leg bent upward in a lively pose.

Visual style: High-resolution anime concept art, crisp clean outlines, subtle watercolor-like shading, fashionable Japanese idol/streetwear design, detailed textiles such as knit, puffer nylon, quilting, pleats, straps, belts, bags, socks, and sneakers. Keep the palette wintery with accents of navy, cream, cobalt blue, neon yellow, black, gray, mint, and plum.

Constraints: Exactly 5 full-body figures, all the same character, no extra people, no captions, no background scene, no cropped feet, no visible facial details, no photorealism, no chibi proportions.
